reviews.review_description:
I have seen this game the beginning, and I never bought it, as I thought the pc version was Meh, and the ad for this, did not grab me. I have every other top title for Go. Saw this on sale, to finally check it out. THIS GAME IS AWESOME!
It's better then I ever expected, and is now is in my top 5 of all my titles. Works so well, (put in intense), headphones, proper "state of mind", Wow, very cool, and clever, never expected, have only played to middle of 2nd world, and havent  even upgraded to my next jet, but already see missions, that are akin to "boss battles in space " really hyped on seeing all of it now, IMO should be among the top selling titles right now, for the GO. Worth the normal price, it would be worth 9.99 for me any day.(but devs, please don't raise the price, and hope for updates, since not many people, like myself,  "got this" the 1st, consider that free demo format, that's done sometimes. It will work great for this game, as their are enough levels, and goals now. To demo like 2 levels, and the sell rest at 4.99, I  would have bought it for sure that way. But I'm glad I got it now, real good job
missions are fast and fun. Gameplay is top notch. Very happy with this game.
Game is pretty good but keeps causing my phone S8+ to crash after about 5min of playing.
Great game until it crashes and I have to reset my phone again. Will there be an update to fix this issue?
I was really enjoying the game when it froze and started making a horrible beeping noise. I took my phone out of the Gear VR and my phone reset itself.

This game is so good. Played it before on Cardboard, but this version has way better graphics and is more stable. Had a snag with the app crashing with Daily Missions, but support got on it as soon as they could and it's fixed. Good job. Buy it, play it. It's pretty difficult when you reach level 1 jet and the daily missions. Worth every penny.
Really like this one..worth the money...
This is a Great game. You can't go wrong with title, never gets old. FLY HIGH my frinds, and I'll see you in the oasis:)
Game crashed all 3 times I tried to play it...loud beep then phone restarts....s8 plus.  How do I get a refund?

developer_response.body:
Update:
Oculus just confirmed that the game runs fine on all S8 Plus models.

For a refund, please, open a ticket with the store and they'll take care of it.

Thanks.

reviews.review_description:
This game graphically is very good, just short of awesome if it had more details,  more interesting environments.
However,  trying to fly a huge ship in front of you doesn't quite work. Hence the 3 star rating I gave it. 
If the POV were from inside a virtual cockpit this game could get a 4, or even a 5 star. 
Because you have to control the ship/plane in front of you,  it'll throw off your controller's calibration. And this POV made me nauseas. 
I don't generally get sick from playing vr games as there are two very prominent flight simulators available for Samsung VR Gear that I play constantly, and one is even a WW2 combat dog fighting simulator that I never get ill from playing. 
Please add a vr cockpit.
Sidenote:
Barf bag needed.
Thought might be outdated and unable to download but a success! a little gem worth keeping.

An After Burner type game is something I hoped to find in VR. 
With this one, I'm not disappointed. Action is fast, the plane control as a breeze with the Go Controller. 
Level progression, upgrades, quick missions and daily missions add a lot to his replayability value. 
As others have noted, add gun cannon to finish those pesky ground targets hidden in canyons (canyon runs !), and it will be perfect. 

As such, it's already worth it's price.

PS : If you're used to this kind of game, skip the arcade difficulty and go directly to Expert.
I have a bug with the daily mission class 1.  While loading, the app closes every time. Also, where the hell is the machine gun ? It really is missing to the whole gameplay... otherwise, I liked it.

Great game with good graphics ! Fast action and dynamic flying! Would be great to be able to do looping btw! And please add a cockpit view so we can enjoy the full landscape !! and it would highly increase immersion! Anyway the game is very good! it sometimes Feel like being in a japanese cartoon

I love this app and played on Google cardboard before gear so transition was natural.

Only issue I have is I wish you could modify controls to utilize both sticks on gamepad.

I use Steel Series XL and the one stick is for pitch and roll but it would be nice to have yaw on other stick .
Fun fire and forget weapons... Nice graphics.... Unfortunately even on the most comfortable settings makes me feel sick.
It is very intense and has great graphics. Lots of upgrades and fun missions. I would be a lot better if you can at least have a machine gun on your jet fighter along with  Other special missions.
Great game
This game is AWESOME!! Worth every penny spent! I can easily say, this is my favorite game on the Oculus Go!
I like everyone else wish it had cockpit view. However I don't feel it hurts the game enough. I love killing time on it. Great controls. Amazing VR experience.
